{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Deew̄ ſazzija: Rau-\
gi/ eß ejinu jums dewis wiſſadu \
Sahlt/ kaß Sehſlu neß/ kaß wirß \
wiſſas Semmes irr/ un wiſſus \
Kohkus/ kam fawi Kohko-Augti \
eeſch ſewis irr/ jums par Eh-\
daimu.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Swehreem \
wirs Semmes/ un wiſſeem Put-\
neem appaſch Debbeß/ un wiſ-\
ſeem leenanieem (Tahrpeem) \
wirs Semmes/ kam dſihwa \
Dwascha irr (efinu es) wiſſu \
faltu Sahli par Barribu-(De-\
wis); un tas notikke ta.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Deeivs uſſkattijahs \
wiſſu/ fo wiſſch bij darrijs/ un \
rangi/ tas bija kohti labs: Un \
tad tappe no Waffara un Rihta \
ta feſta Deena.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta II. Nodalla.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Septitâ Deenâ duſſeja Deeivs / un fwehtija to \
Swehdeenu : 3. Ta Semme tappe zaur \
Miglu bes Leetus flazzinata: 4. Abdams \
ftua no Semmes. Pihtes no Deewa raddihts/ \
kas winnam weenu dſihwu Dwaschu eepuhte : \
7. Paradibſes Dahrsâ likke: 15. Bet win- \
nam tappe peekohdinahts/ fa tam ne bij ehſt \
no ta Kohka tahs Atſihſchanas labba un tau- \
na: 17. Dabbuja weenu Geewu: 18. Kas \
no winna Sahn-Raula b., pataisita: 21.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "a irr pabeigtas Debbeß \
Fun Semme / un wiſſs \
winan Spehks.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Deew̄ ſeptitâ Deenâ \
favu Darbu nobeidſis/ fo wiſſch \
bij darrijis/duſſeja ſeptitâ Deenâ\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Deew̄ ſwehtija to fo \
titu Deenu / un eeſwehtija t \
tapehz ka tas duſſejis bij no wi-\
fawa Darba / fo Deew̄ raddi \
bij/ ka wiſſch to iſtaifitu.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schee irr tee Taitijumi De \
bes un Semmes/ kad tee radd \
tappe / tai Brithdi / kad DEe- \
tas KUNGS Semmi un De \
best darrija.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſus Kruhmus Lauk \
pirms tee wirs Semmes bij \
ſchi / un wiſſadu Sahli Lauk \
pirmak ka tahs bij eesalfojuſcha \
jo DEews tas KUNGS wehl \
bij lizzis Leetu liht wirs Se- \
mes / un ne kahds Zilweks bija \
kas to Semmi buhtu apkoypis\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Migla zehſahs no ta \
Semmes / un flappinaja wiſ- \
Semmi.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un DEews tas KUNG \
taſſija to Zilweku / kas Pihſc \
irr/ no tahs Semmes/ un eepe \
te winna Nahſis weenu dſihu \
Garru/ tad tappe tas Zilweks p \
dſihwu Dwehfeli.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un DEews tas KUNG \
bij weenu Dahrsu ſtahdtijs Ged \
nê prett Rihteem / un eeze- \
tur to Zilweku / fo wiſſch \
taifijis.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un DEews tas KUNG \
isandſinaja no Semmes wiſ- \
dus Kohkus / kas jauki bija pe \
Usluhkoſchanas / un labbi pe \
Ehschanas/ un tahs Dſihwoſch \
nas Kohku Dahrsa widdû / ir\n"
    }
  ],
